ops.title: Fast-lane commitment set does not survive proxy restart
ops.description: Accepted v1 cut (see session.rs SessionEcon.fast_lane scope-cut comment). The commitment set is in-memory only: a restart forgets it, so previously-committed leaves re-render ORIGINAL bytes once — one cache bust per restarted session. (The window floor is NOT affected: last_message_count initializes to usize::MAX, keeping the window closed until the first egress snapshot.) Fix: persist the commitment set keyed by session (refs.db is the natural home) or accept-and-document permanently.

ops.text: committed keys survive a proxy restart without a re-render bust, or the cut is promoted to a documented permanent tradeoff
